items.briefing:
Australian financial services organisations face growing cyber risk as rapid AI adoption is creating new security vulnerabilities, according to recent findings. Separately, Australian compliance teams are warning that disconnected data systems (data silos) are making it harder to spot and respond to security threats — a gap that could leave sensitive information exposed.

Small and medium businesses should also be alert to a malware campaign using fake online ads to deliver the "Vidar" infostealer, which harvests passwords and personal data. A recent case also showed a lone attacker compromised a major cloud environment in just 72 hours using AI tools.

**Tip:** Be cautious clicking sponsored or promoted links in search results — go directly to official websites instead.

featured.title: Australian compliance teams flag data silos as key gap
featured.quote: Data silos leave Australian financial firms exposed to breaches during critical AI security transition.
